ArcForge CMS
View Site中文

ArcForge CMS Installer

Create the first owner account. CMS v3 automatically creates the required D1 tables when the admin area opens, so no manual SQL migration is needed.

Cloudflare needs only SESSION_SECRET. The installer creates the database tables automatically and stores the owner password in D1 as a salted hash.

Admin Login

Manage artwork data, media, users, and website settings.

CMS v3 uses D1 users, automatic database initialization, and secure HttpOnly cookies. No ADMIN_USERNAME, ADMIN_PASSWORD, or manual migration is needed.

Configuration Needed

Please set SESSION_SECRET in Cloudflare Pages Variables & Secrets, then redeploy. This is the only required admin secret.

ArcForge CMS

Dashboard

Ready.

Artworks

Edit the product information shown on the public English and Chinese pages.

Edit artwork

Upload media for selected artwork

Media Library

Files uploaded to Cloudflare R2. Click a key to copy it into the selected artwork gallery.

Users

Manage CMS accounts. Passwords are stored in D1 as salted hashes, never as plain text.

Loading...

Change my password

Add admin user

Site Settings

Basic editable settings stored in D1. More fields can be added later.
